title: Full-spectrum distortion projector
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''full-spectrum distortion projector''' was a component of the [[4x-Phantom Short-Range Sensor Jammer/Legends|4x-Phantom Short-Range Sensor Jammer]] manufactured by [[Miradyne Limited]] for use in the [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptor]]. This component attempted to block all scanners and [[Targeting computer/Legends|targeting computers]] by using broadband transmissions intended to interfere with sensors attempting to target the A-wing.<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-11-XX -->''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''
